title: Tunisian Frittata
description: A creamy and flavorful Tunisian-inspired omelette made with eggs and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: creamy cheese
ingredients.notes: such as goat cheese or feta

ingredients.name: tunisian spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, creamy cheese, and tunisian spices.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked onion and garlic in the skillet.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, until the frittata is set.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
